ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
Language: python
Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
Language: python
Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HKUDS/CLI-Anything

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PastKing/tgbot-verify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PastKing/tgbot-verify
Language: python
一个基于 Python Telegram Bot 的自动化认证工具，能够自动完成 SheerID 平台的学生/教师身份验证流程。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/unsloth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth
Language: python
Unsloth Studio is a web UI for training and running open models like Gemma 4, Qwen3.6, DeepSeek, gpt-oss locally.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vllm-project/vllm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm
Language: python
A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: volcengine/OpenViking
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/volcengine/OpenViking
Language: python
OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
